-->

## 📖 The Story

### WHY - What problem are we solving?
<!-- Explain the friction or limitation in the current architecture. e.g., "V.A.N.T.i.S. lacks a personal context layer..." -->


### HOW - What did we actually change?
<!-- Detail the technical implementation. e.g., "Created USER_CONTEXT.md and updated the system prompt." -->


### IMPACT - What is the result?
<!-- Explain how the system is better now. e.g., "V.A.N.T.i.S. can now generate Ryan-specific insights." -->
